name: @nexus/glasses
description: Cockpit client for the session-cockpit hub — web dashboard now, Even G2 HUD (even-toolkit) next.

scripts.build:pack: tsc --noEmit && VITE_BASE=./ vite build --outDir dist-pack --emptyOutDir && node scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs dist-pack
scripts.pack: npm run build:pack && evenhub pack app.json ./dist-pack -o session-cockpit.ehpk

comment: Phase 3b adds even-toolkit + @evenrealities/even_hub_sdk for the HUD; kept out of the first install so the dashboard installs clean. typescript is held at 5.9 (not ^7 like the root workspace) because @evenrealities/evenhub-cli peers on `typescript: ^5` — TS 6+ fails the install and breaks `npm run pack`. Dependabot ignores the major bump; see .github/dependabot.yml.
